title: Godfather of AI blasts Musk's xAI as 'failure,' says labs are risking a 'big bubble explosion'
summary_full: Yann LeCun's comments renew a long-running spat with Musk and cast doubt over valuations of some of the world's biggest AI companies.
summary_public: Yann LeCun's comments renew a long-running spat with Musk and cast doubt over valuations of some of the world's biggest AI companies.
